untranslatable_reason: This signal is a position sizing / leverage rule (half-Kelly criterion) rather than a directional entry/exit signal. It requires: (1) calculation of historical Sharpe ratio or returns distribution to derive Kelly fraction, (2) dynamic leverage adjustment based on portfolio statistics, and (3) net worth maximization objective. None of these are implementable as simple indicator-based entry/exit conditions using the allowed indicator set. The signal lacks specific price action, technical indicator thresholds, or regime conditions that would trigger entry/exit. AUTHOR_SILENT parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period) indicate incomplete specification.
translation_notes: Signal ID CHAN_AT_DRY_9 describes a money management overlay, not a trading rule. It should be implemented as a position sizing module external to the entry/exit rule engine, calculating optimal leverage from rolling Sharpe ratio and applying 0.5× Kelly leverage adjustment. The source text fragment is illegible/incomplete and does not support rule translation.
